sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 21:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 21:1
items.html: The measure of coarseness of phase three and phase two is called Yods. (Item 56, and Inner Light, Sub Header, “In Yods”)
